description_long: This is a single slice of cake with two visible layers of moist, brown sponge separated by a thick layer of creamy white frosting. The top surface is generously coated with a glossy layer of icing and sprinkled with a mix of seeds or nuts, giving it a rustic and textured appearance. The sides reveal the even distribution of cake and frosting, with the frosting slightly oozing at the edges. The triangular shape is classic for a cake slice, with a wide back tapering to a pointed front. The overall finish is slightly uneven, suggesting a homemade or artisanal style. The cake appears soft and moist, with a semi-glossy finish on the icing and a matte, crumbly texture on the sponge.
description: A triangular slice of cake with two brown sponge layers, creamy white frosting, and a seed-studded glossy icing on top. The cake looks moist, rustic, and homemade.
description_view_0: Side view showing the two sponge layers, thick frosting, and the textured, seed-covered top.
description_view_1: Pointed front view highlighting the triangular shape and the dense, seed-studded icing surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear display of the cake and frosting layers, and the glossy, decorated top.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the wide base, thick frosting, and the rustic, uneven finish of the cake's back.
